workflows.derivation: render_workflows(OWNER/REPO, 2.0.0) offline workflow: the check job step 2 run_body is a single certified execution source resolving the managed audit-check-lint sequence; D1 keeps the job PR-reachable and D6 batches the bash run body. No diagnostics.
render_workflows linear workflow: the linear job is not PR-reachable and is pruned by D1, so it contributes no scanned source and no diagnostic. It never enters the Tier 1 findings.

derivation: Tier 1 renders the two managed workflows with doc_lattice.github_ci.render.render_workflows and evaluates them through the D1+D6 harness. Only the offline workflow's check-job run body is PR-reachable and marker-bearing; it certifies the exact managed sequence [ci, check, lint]. The linear workflow's sole job is pruned. Findings pin that sequence; diagnostics are zero.
